name: 虚幻的床榻前
description: 充满柔光与雾气的虚幻空间，隐约可见一张古朴的床榻。周围没有明确的墙壁，只有白茫茫的微光。床头放着一碗冒着热气的清粥，一切显得不真实却又无比温柔。
visual_reference: An illusory, dreamlike ancient Chinese bedroom. A simple wooden bed surrounded by soft glowing mist and white light. No clear walls, ethereal atmosphere. A bowl of steaming hot porridge on a bedside table. Soft focus, angelic lighting, surreal, masterpiece.
lighting: 无源的柔和漫反射光，自带发光效果，没有明显的阴影。
emotional_range: 跨越生死的悲伤告别与灵魂枷锁的解脱。
